formal_strategy_baseline: ONE_SHOT_DONCHIAN_ATR_BREAKOUT 1.0.0 on BTCUSDT-PERP; fixed background only
question: Can a fixed monthly symmetric 60/90/180-day direction ensemble on BTCUSDT USD-M perpetual remain profitable after actual funding and conservative costs in development, evaluation, and a rule-level confirmation period, with risk suitable for a small personal account?
rebalance: first 8h boundary of every UTC month
funding_rule: Use every actual funding event; normalize only timestamps within 1 second of their nearest 8h boundary, reject collisions or larger offsets; positive funding debits longs and credits shorts; no aggregation
period_rationale: Development starts after 180 days of locked source history. Confirmation ends before Binance's September 2025 dynamic funding-interval regime because this source has 8h bars and the rule requires exact settlement alignment.
development_gate: data PASS; ensemble base and stress total return >0; max drawdown >-20%; no more than 2pp deeper than continuous 0.25x long; worst observed 8h intrabar adverse >-10%; at least two of three single windows base >0; turnover <=12
evaluation_gate: data PASS; ensemble base and stress total return >0; 2023 and 2024 each >0; max drawdown >-18%; no more than 2pp deeper than continuous 0.25x long; adverse >-10%; at least two single windows base >0
confirmation_gate: data PASS; ensemble base and stress total return >0; max drawdown >-15%; no more than 2pp deeper than continuous 0.25x long; adverse >-10%; at least two single windows base >=0; evaluation+confirmation compounded >0
conclusion_rule: SUPPORTS_WITHIN_SCOPE only if all sequential gates pass. A negative confirmation or evaluation+confirmation return is DOES_NOT_SUPPORT. Other non-passing evidence is INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE.
study_code_revision_reason: Before any result file existed, normalize only Binance fundingTime offsets within 1 second of the nearest 8h boundary; observed max 47ms, zero larger offsets and zero collisions through the confirmation boundary. Economic rules and gates unchanged.
known_exposure: The underlying 2021-2025 BTC public data and prior long-only directional outcomes have been exposed by earlier questions. This is a rule-level holdout: this exact long/short ensemble has not been executed before this checkpoint.
benchmarks: continuous 0.25x BTCUSDT perpetual with identical funding and costs
formal product strategy as identity-only fixed background
allowed_fixes: implementation defects that do not alter periods, signal, weights, costs, funding, benchmarks, or gates
forbidden_after_checkpoint: reading a holdout before the previous gate authorizes it
